positive: A symmetrical, intricate celestial mandala design featuring intertwined elements of stylized bioluminescent flora, constellations, and geometric patterns. The main subject is a central circular bloom of cosmic energy, surrounded by sweeping galactic trails and stylized lunar phases. Utilize deep sapphire blues, vibrant teal, ethereal lavender, and contrasting metallic gold accents. The style should be highly detailed vector art mixed with ethereal watercolor washes, emphasizing clean silhouettes, strong contrast, and perfect symmetry. The composition must be centered and optimized for apparel printing, creating a striking, mystic focal point. Studio lighting, high resolution, ultra-detailed linework.
